message:
test(core): property-based tests for incident_bundle and recorder_invariants (72 tests)

47 tests for incident_bundle: format version compat, privacy budget
validation/truncation, bundle file semantics, replay modes, manifest
serde, budget summary tier detection, dirname format, readme generation.

25 tests for recorder_invariants: well-formed sequence acceptance,
report metadata/predicate consistency, duplicate event_id detection,
sequence regression/gap detection, schema version mismatch, causality
chain validation, replay determinism reflexivity/mismatch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
